characters.name: 江岚
characters.description: 2D国漫少女角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，年轻女性，黑色中长发带整齐刘海，圆润清秀但不幼态的脸，浅灰蓝长袖连衣裙，深色腰带，清楚可见的领口、袖口和裙摆层次，平底深色鞋，身形纤细，气质安静克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景，完整穿衣，不能像灰模或人体模板。

characters.name: 沈砚
characters.description: 2D国漫青年男性角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，黑色短发，清秀偏瘦的脸，深色长外套或长袍内搭浅色上衣，长裤和深色鞋靴，身形修长，气质沉稳克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景。

shots.title: 河边远景建立
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, establishing wide shot, riverside at dusk, old stone bridge in the mid background, willow trees and stone bank on screen left, open river surface on screen right, Jiang Lan stands screen left and Shen Yan stands screen right near the waterline, both characters appear as small but readable full figures naturally placed inside the environment, stable layout, clean line art, cel-shaded forms, unified character-and-scene stylization
shots.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, abstract texture, warped bridge, melted buildings, random crowd, extra people, deformed anatomy, duplicated body, tiny people, empty scene, white cutout block, pasted character sheet, mosaic artifacts, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: slow push in, river surface ripples gently, willow leaves sway slightly, both characters remain mostly still and establish screen position
shots.notes: 首帧测试。镜头语言：桥在中后景，河面朝画面右侧延伸，江岚在左、沈砚在右，人物站在岸边而不是漂在水里。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 双人中景起话
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, medium two shot at the same riverside location, camera moves closer from the establishing shot, Jiang Lan stands in the left half of frame and turns slightly toward Shen Yan on the right half, bridge remains visible in the rear center, willow bank still stays on screen left, stone path visible under both characters, keep the exact same costume, hairstyle, face identity and environment layout from previous shot
shots.negative_prompt: different location, changed bridge, changed clothes, wrong face, extra limbs, distant tiny figure, overexposed, noisy image, collage artifacts, white cutout block, pasted character sheet, mosaic artifacts, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Jiang Lan gives a small head turn and subtle hand gesture while speaking, Shen stays mostly still, camera remains stable
shots.notes: 同场景续帧测试 1。人物应自然站在岸边石路上，不能像贴纸贴进画面，也不能把背景改成空白天际线。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 江岚近景说话
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, closer medium shot focused on Jiang Lan on screen center-left at the same riverside bank, Shen Yan appears smaller on screen right as a secondary figure, river and bridge stay in the same orientation as before, Jiang Lan speaks calmly with a slight side turn, upper body larger in frame but still integrated into the riverbank environment, keep the same face, hair, costume color and lighting continuity
shots.negative_prompt: new person, glamour portrait, indoor selfie, fashion shoot, random background, wrong hairstyle, changed outfit, blurry face, cut off head, cut off hands, white cutout block, pasted character sheet, mosaic artifacts, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Jiang Lan lip movement and a slight shoulder motion, Shen gives a minimal reaction in background, soft river movement continues
shots.dialogue: 江岚：先沿着河岸往前走。
shots.notes: 单人偏主镜头测试。江岚应占主体，但沈砚仍需在场景里作为次要人物存在，背景不能被抹成纯白或空块。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 沈砚回应点头
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, reverse medium close shot focused on Shen Yan on screen center-right at the same riverside location, Jiang Lan appears only as a blurred foreground shoulder or side silhouette on screen left edge, same bridge and river orientation, same willow trees, same dusk light, Shen Yan nods lightly and answers, preserve exact identity, clothing and environment continuity, use a clear reverse angle rather than repeating the prior composition
shots.negative_prompt: wrong person, swapped character, changed environment, malformed hands, duplicated face, extreme close crop, empty scene, heavy blur, white cutout block, pasted character sheet, floating UI box, random cube, mosaic artifacts, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Shen nods gently and gives a brief reply, camera stays steady, background remains unchanged
shots.dialogue: 沈砚：好，桥那边看得更清楚。
shots.notes: 反打测试。沈砚是主体，江岚只在前景边缘提示存在，桥和河岸方向不能翻转，也不能出现随机发光方块或杂物。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 并肩沿河慢走
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, medium wide shot, Jiang Lan and Shen Yan walk slowly side by side along the same riverside path from screen left toward screen right, bridge remains in the rear background, river stays on the right side of frame, preserve both character identities and same environment layout while clearly changing body pose, stride, and staging from the prior static dialogue shots
shots.negative_prompt: different background, changed bridge position, random strangers, body duplication, fused limbs, floating feet, deformed anatomy, far away tiny people, white cutout block, pasted character sheet, mosaic artifacts, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: both characters take a few slow steps forward, clothes move lightly in the breeze, camera tracks gently with them
shots.notes: 动作续帧测试。两人应真的走在河边石路上，脚要接地，不能漂浮，也不能直接把角色立绘贴进场景。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。

shots.title: 桥边停步收尾
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, closing medium two shot near the same bridge by the riverside, Jiang Lan and Shen Yan stop walking and look toward the water, Jiang Lan slightly in front on screen left and Shen Yan half step behind on screen right, same dusk lighting, same bridge orientation, same willow trees, same stone bank, preserve exact face, clothing and scene continuity, final held composition distinct from the walking shot
shots.negative_prompt: new location, changed costume, changed face, indoor lighting, abstract smear, low detail, duplicated person, body out of frame, white cutout block, pasted character sheet, mosaic artifacts, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: both characters stop and hold briefly, subtle eye movement and slight cloth motion, soft water ripples in background
shots.dialogue: 江岚：就从这里开始看吧。
shots.notes: 收尾测试。两人应仍处于同一河边空间关系里，前后站位明确，人物与背景风格统一，没有白块、马赛克或贴图感。
shots.scene_prompt: 傍晚河边，必须可见开阔河面、清晰岸线、旧石桥、垂柳、沿河石路与对岸轮廓，纯户外自然河岸环境，不是树林草坡，不是公园草地。
